property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - Remove from the game the bottom X cards of your opponent's discards. X = the base damage of this attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: It this attack is Unstoppable, this attack does +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - Your "Unstoppable" attacks deal +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your next Black styled attack this turn gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you have a Level 3 MP, this attack does +4 damage and costs -2 stages.) 3, Mastery:

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If this attack is "Unstoppable," your opponent cannot use his Mastery for this turn and the next.

property.name: Text
property.value: (When this Support is removed from the game, discard it instead.) 1: Your next physical attack this turn does +3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card costs -1 stage for each Blue styled Support you have in play.) 3: Stop a physical attack. Draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP is Level 3, this card costs -2 stages.) 3, Mastery: This attack does +2 damage for each Support you have in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Put into your hand up to 3 Blue styled Supports from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: This attack deals +X damage. X = the number of Events you played this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 2: This attack deals +X damage. X = the number of Freestyle cards in your discards to a max of 10.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - After one of your successful energy attacks deals damage, you may remove from the game a Combat Event or Support in your opponent's discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 0: For this turn and the next, your attacks count as energy attacks for your effects.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 3: Discard 2 cards from your hand to put 1 card from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Trait
property.value: Saiyan; Human

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Instead of discarding for your Mastery this turn, you may draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your Refocused Energy attacks cost -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Your opponent may take up to 5 damage. For each damage he does not take, you may put a card from your discards at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 6: You may put this card on top of your life deck after use instead of discarding it. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If your MP's level is higher than your opponent's MP's level, you may put this card at the top of your life deck after use instead of discarding it.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1, Namek: Stop an energy attack of 8 base damage or less. Your MP's PUR gains -1 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: SUCCESSFUL - If your MP is a Namek, put the top 2 Namekian styled discards at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack. If your MP is a Namek, shuffle this card into your life deck after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 4: If you have 6 or more Namekian styled cards in your discards, draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If your have 6 or more Namekian styled cards in your discards, put up to 3 Freestyle cards from your discards at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 1: If you have 6 or more Orange styled cards in your discards, this attack deals +X damage. X = the number of Orange Styled Supports in your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: If this Personality's current power rating is 1,000 or less, you may put in play a Support from your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - Once per turn during your Attack Phase, you may discard a card from your hand to put an Orange styled Support from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: CONSTANT - When you perform an attack, you may pay +1 stage for that attack to deal +2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: If this Personality's current power rating is 1,000 or less, this attack does +AT damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: Your Supports cannot be removed from the game by your opponent's effects for this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: CONSTANT - When you Refocus with a Red styled attack, its damage gains +2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: Stop a physical attack. For this turn, when you Refocus, your opponent takes 1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: When you Refocus with this attack, its damage gains +2.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: When you Refocus with this attack, your opponent takes 3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Your opponent cannot Refocus against this attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, your Saiyan styled attacks gain, "Successful - Capture!"

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: SUCCESSFUL - You may take 4 damage to draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Stop a physical attack. If your opponent stops your next attack this turn, you may draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If this personality is a Saiyan, your opponent cannot perform an attack in his next Attack Phase unless a Saiyan personality performs it.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Search your life deck for a Saiyan styled attack and put it in your hand. Discard a random card from your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you have taken at least 6 damage this turn, this attack deals +3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3, Mastery: Stop a physical attack. Your next Black styled attack this turn gains "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Your opponent chooses one of his Supports in play. You may discard that Support, or you may have him discard a card from his hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If you Refocus with this card, remove from the game the bottom 2 cards of your opponent's discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card costs -1 stage for each card you have in your hand more than your opponent) 4:

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack. Your next Black styled attack this turn gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: SUCCESSFUL- You may pay 1 stage to put into your hand a physical attack from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 1: Discard a Blue styled Support from your hand to make your next Blue styled attack this turn deal +4 damage and cost -3 stages to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: Stop an energy attack. You may discard a Blue styled Support from your hand to gain 2 stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: You may discard any Blue styled physical attacks from your hand. Your next Blue styled attack this turn does +X damage. X = the total base costs of the discarded cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your Freestyle Events and Freestyle Supports cost -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: This attack does +X damage. X = Your MP's Level times 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: This attack does +X damage. X = the number of Saiyans your opponent has.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: For this turn, your other attacks performed by Aliens do +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: You may put a Named card from your discard pile into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your opponent may lose up to 3 stages. Gain X stages. X = the number of stages your opponent did not lose.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Take X damage. For this turn, your attacks deal +X damage. X = this personality's level.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If all your personalities are Humans, put into play a Freestyle Support from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: Put into play a Namekian styled Support from your discards and draw 2 cards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: This attack deals +X damage. X = the number of stages you gained this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Name a card in your opponent's discards. Your opponent cannot play and/or use a card with that title this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Your opponent may lose a stage. If he does not, your next attack this turn costs -3 stages to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: If the top and bottom cards of your discards are both Namekian styled, you may put one of those cards into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If you have at least 4 Supports in your discards, you may put in play an Orange styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: For this turn, when a Support is discarded from your life deck as damage, you may discard a card from your hand to put that Support in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop a physical attack. Put an Orange styled Support from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Stop an energy attack of X base cost or less. X = the number of Orange Supports you have in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 3: Discard any number of cards from your hand to draw the same number of cards. You may put in play any Supports from your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1: Draw X cards. X = the number of times you Refocused this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: If you Refocused at least once this turn, your opponent cannot Refocus against your attacks this Combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1, Mastery: If you prevented all the damage from 2 or more of your opponent's attacks this turn with your Red styled cards, your opponent cannot use "Successful - " effects for this turn and the next.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Stop an energy attack. You cannot Refocus during your opponent's next attack this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: CONSTANT - While your MP's level is higher than your opponent's MP's level, cards your opponent plays as a defense cost +1 stage to use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP is Level 3, this attack's base damage is twice the AT instead.) 5, Mastery: You may take 6 damage to have this attack deal +6 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: You may take 4 damage to have your PUR gain +1 for this turn and the next.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may remove from the game 10 Saiyan styled cards from your discards to have your next Saiyan styled attack this Combat gain, "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 0: All players draw the top card of their discards.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Search your life deck for a Zarbon Named card and put it in your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 7: If your opponent has any Saiyans, this attack does +4 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: Discard a Black styled card from your hand to have your next Black styled attack this turn gain "Unstoppable" and "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 2, Mastery: Discard a random card from your opponent's hand. Search your opponent's life deck and hand for any copies of that card and discard them.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Choose for your opponent to discard a card from his hand or to have his MP lose 2 stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: Your next "Unstoppable" Black styled attack this turn costs -3 stages to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If you Refocus with this card, you may put into your hand a Blue styled Physical Combat card from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card costs -1 stage for each Blue styled Support you have in play.) 6:

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: You may discard a Blue styled Support from your hand to have this attack gain "Unpreventable."

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: Put a Blue styled Physical Combat from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 1, Mastery: For this turn, you count as having performed +1 Blue styled physical attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 2: Search your life deck for a Freestyle Event and put it in your hand. Your opponent takes 2 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 2: If your opponent prevents damage from this attack, draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your first attack each Combat does +X damage. X = the number of Aliens you have.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Unstoppable.) 8: Your opponent's non-Aliens each lose 1 stage. SUCCESSFUL - Capture!

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Once per turn, you may remove from the game X cards from your discards to stop an energy attack. X = the attack's base damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: You may shuffle up to 3 Freestyle cards from your discards into your life deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 2: If have Tien and Chiaotzu, this attack does +3 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5: Put your top 3 discards at the bottom of your life deck. This attack deals +X damage. X = the number of Namekian styled cards you put at the bottom with this effect.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 5, Mastery: Your attacks that do a base damage of AT cost -1 stage to a minimum of 1 for this turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 2: CONSTANT - When your opponent passes in his Attack Phase, you may put the top card of your discards at the bottom of your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: If your MP's level is higher than your opponent's MP's level, this attack deals +3 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: CONSTANT - While your MP's power rating is 1,000 or less, attacks performed by your MP gain "Unstoppable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 2, Mastery: SUCCESSFUL - Search your life deck for an Orange styled Support you have in play and put it into play.

property.name: Text
property.value: (Limit 1 per deck.) 2: CONSTANT - Your first Orange styled attack each turn deals +X damage. X = the number of Supports you have with Constant effects.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3, Mastery: Put in play an Orange styled Support from your discards.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 2: If you Refocus with this attack, then for the rest of the turn your Red styled attacks cost -1 stage to a minimum of 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 3, Mastery: For this turn, when you Refocus with an attack, you may draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 3: If your opponent has 6 or more stages, this attack gains "Unstoppable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 4: For this turn, when you Refocus with an attack, that attack gains, "Capture!"

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 2: For this turn, when you Refocus with an attack, your next attack this turn gains, "Unpreventable."

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: You may choose for your next attack this Combat to have a base damage of AT instead of its printed base damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use.) 3: SUCCESSFUL - Your opponent discards a card from his hand after he performs a physical attack this turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. If your MP is level 2 or higher, this card costs 1 stage instead.) 3, Mastery: Stop an energy attack. Put a Saiyan styled attack from your discards into your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, your Saiyan styled attacks deal +X damage. X = the number of personalities your opponent has. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: 1: For this turn, when you take damage to use one of your effects, take 4 less damage to use that effect instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Physical attacks performed by this personality do +1 damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.) 1: You may take up to 5 damage to gain X stages. X = the amount of damage you took with this effect.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - When you perform a Saiyan styled attack, you may take 1 damage to have that attack deal +1 damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: CONSTANT - Your opponent takes 2 damage when he attacks or prevents damage from an attack performed by this Personality.
